info.title: NX-Mod-Manager
info.author: TOM (Bad EN)
info.description: A mod management tool designed specifically for the Nintendo Switch
info.details:
A mod management tool designed specifically for the Nintendo Switch platform. The current version features a complete code rewrite and architecture redesign, with significant improvements in both functionality and stability.
Users still on version 2.x should uninstall all installed mods using the old version before upgrading to the new version.

Features:

- Modern, aesthetically pleasing interface with excellent user experience.
- Supports online mod browsing, downloading, and uploading via built-in mod store.
- Complete on-device mod management without manually handling the SD card.
- Game management with favorites, custom names, and manual TID entry.
- Smart detection for non-standard directory structures and file conflicts between mods.
- Automatic pchtxt to IPS patch conversion during installation.
- Supports MTP (USB) and FTP (Wi-Fi) file transfer.
- Smart search with pinyin, fuzzy matching, and initials support.
- One-click mod toggle for quick troubleshooting.
- Multi-language support (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English).
- Light and dark themes with auto system-following.
- In-app auto update.

changelog:
v3.0.0

- Major overhaul: entire project rewritten with redesigned architecture. Incompatible with 2.x — uninstall all mods using the old version before upgrading.
- Completely new UI design, improved quality.
- Redesigned interactions, enhanced user experience.
- Added online mod download feature, covering 200+ games and 380 mods in total, including hundreds of exclusive mods.
- Two theme color schemes available, freely switchable.
- Mod store content supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English, auto-adapts to system language.
- Mod store supports fuzzy search by Pinyin, initials, or English.
- Supports PCHTXT files, automatically converted to IPS files during installation.
- New custom keyboard in multiple places, improving aesthetics and smoothness.
- Full touch support, can be used entirely without a controller.
- In-app self-update, no need to monitor release pages.
- Game names customizable, can be fetched from server database in three languages.
- Multi-language plugin text (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English).
- One-click disable all mods for quick debugging.
- Added forced clean-up feature.
- Optimized multi-mod file conflict detection and resolution.
- Intelligent mod file path recognition, no longer need to follow the old mod file structure.
- Added FTP feature for wireless mod file transfer.
- Rewritten MTP feature for more stable transfer.
